message:
feat(agent): implement pt agent explain command with full posterior computation

Add comprehensive explainability for process classification:
- Evidence ledger generation with Bayes factor breakdown
- Multiple output formats (JSON, markdown, summary)
- Galaxy-brain mode for detailed per-feature evidence analysis
- Session-aware with priors loaded from config or defaults

Also fixes pre-existing compilation issues:
- CriticalFile.rule_id: &'static str -> String for Deserialize
- enforcer.rs import path from private module to public re-export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
